description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Packaging that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and publish. The build job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies, builds the package using tox, and uploads the package as an artifact. The publish job runs on ubuntu-22.04, depends on the build job, and is triggered on tag pushes. It downloads the package artifact, and publishes it to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
